claimText: INS Arnala is India's first Anti-Submarine Warfare Shallow Water Craft (ASW-SWC).
evidenceExcerpt: INS Arnala is India's first Anti-Submarine Warfare Shallow Water Craft (ASW-SWC).
examUse: Correct-pair question matching naval ships to their specific class or function.

claimText: INS Arnala is the largest Indian Naval warship propelled by a Diesel Engine-Waterjet combination.
evidenceExcerpt: Largest Indian Naval warship to be propelled by a Diesel Engine-Waterjet combination.
examUse: Statement-based question on the propulsion technology of modern Indian naval vessels.

claimText: INS Nistar is India's first indigenously designed and constructed Diving Support Vessel.
evidenceExcerpt: INS Nistar is India's first indigenously designed Diving Support Vessel.
examUse: Statement-based question on indigenous naval developments.

claimText: INS Nistar serves as a Mother Ship for Deep Submergence Rescue Vessels (DSRV) for deep sea saturation diving up to 300m.
evidenceExcerpt: INS Nistar serves as a 'Mother Ship' for Deep Submergence Rescue Vessels (DSRV) for deep sea saturation diving up to 300m.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the specific operational role of INS Nistar.
